## Summary

What does this PR change, in one or two sentences?

## Related

- Fixes #(issue)  
- PRD / ROADMAP reference (if applicable): …

## Checklist

- [ ] I read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [ARCHITECTURE.md](../ARCHITECTURE.md) where relevant  
- [ ] `pnpm ci:all` passes locally (or I note why CI-only)  
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior/API changes  
- [ ] Docs updated for user-visible behavior (README, ADOPTION, PRD sections, or `docs/`)  
- [ ] No unintended wire-format / semver change (or marked **breaking** and justified)  

## Notes for reviewers

Optional: design tradeoffs, follow-ups, or risk areas.
